welcome.hero.title:
Three tools.
One platform.
welcome.hero.subtitle: Analyze GmbHs, financial statements and real estate with automatic KPI calculation, traffic-light system and professional PDF reports — all in one modern platform.
welcome.tools.label: Analysis Tools
welcome.tools.title: Everything you need
welcome.tools.subtitle: Three specialized analysis modules that work seamlessly together and turn your data into sound decision-making foundations.
welcome.tools.gmbh.title: GmbH Analysis
welcome.tools.gmbh.desc: Complete company analysis with 8 weighted KPIs. From revenue growth to LTV/CAC ratio — automatic score 0–100 with financing recommendation.
welcome.tools.ja.title: Financial Statement
welcome.tools.ja.desc: 3-year analysis with balance sheet and P&L. 12 KPIs with traffic-light system and trend arrows — plus automatically generated report text.
welcome.tools.ja.footer: 3 years at once · Trend ↑↓ · Auto report
welcome.tools.imm.title: Real Estate Analysis
welcome.tools.imm.desc: Professional real estate valuation with NOI, DSCR, LTV and rental yield. Financing plan, cashflow projection and compare objects directly.
welcome.features.label: Platform Features
welcome.features.title: Everything at a glance
welcome.features.traffic.title: Traffic-Light System
welcome.features.traffic.desc: Every KPI is automatically evaluated and color-coded — immediately visible what is good and what needs attention.
welcome.features.pdf.title: PDF Export
welcome.features.pdf.desc: Professional reports with logo, KPI tables and interpretation — ready to send to customers or investors.
welcome.features.multi.title: Multi-Company
welcome.features.multi.desc: Manage any number of companies. All analyses are clearly assigned and stored separately.
welcome.features.access.title: Access Control
welcome.features.access.desc: Roles admin, analyst and viewer. Each user only sees their own analyses.
welcome.features.score.title: Score 0–100
welcome.features.score.desc: Weighted overall score with clear recommendation — from "Very good" to "Critical".
welcome.features.history.title: Analysis History
welcome.features.history.desc: All past analyses saved and retrievable at any time. Keep an eye on the timeline.
welcome.how.label: How it works
welcome.how.title:
In 4 steps
to the analysis
welcome.how.step1.title: Create company
welcome.how.step1.desc: Create a company with name, industry and currency as the central basis for all analyses.
welcome.how.step2.title: Select tool
welcome.how.step2.desc: Choose between GmbH Analysis, Financial Statement or Real Estate Analysis — depending on your task.
welcome.how.step3.title: Enter data
welcome.how.step3.desc: Enter financial KPIs — guided form, clear field labels, all inputs validated.
welcome.how.step4.title: Get results
welcome.how.step4.desc: Automatic score, traffic-light evaluation and PDF report — ready to download or share.
welcome.cta.title: Ready to start?
welcome.cta.subtitle: Start your first analysis now and make better financial decisions with Allocore.
Start with a GmbH or real estate analysi: Start with a GmbH or real estate analysis.
